content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Opinion Request Meeting Participants.

Date: Feb. 16, 1977

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Ken Finney

Subject:

1. Does Section 82029 apply only to first tier disclosure? In other words, is the only method of triggering a second tier disclosure of investments or interests in real property to resort to the last sentence in Sections 82033 and 82034?

2. In applying Sections 82033 and 82034, do we apply the concept of community property and separate property in the same way we do to the definition of income in Section 82030. For example, if a filer and his spouse each own 9% of a business entity, is there any reporting obligation with respect to the investments of that business entity. Further, if a spouse owns 15% of a business entity as her separate property, is there any disclosure obligation for the filer?

KF: jo
